headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -112.6)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 97% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 165 quotes and massive strong intensity (136 strong vs just 28 moderate) - people are extremely aggravated today.

• The frustration score of 82.2 sits in the middle of the 130-day range but represents a major spike from yesterday's 31.6.

• Fears recovered significantly from yesterday's deep low while optimism dropped sharply into negative territory.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
